name: Diamitani Music
tagline: Label, publishing, and artist-services holding under Diamitani Industries.

flow.detail: Artist agreement sets a split profile (artist / label / producer) and an optional recoupable advance — no black-box deal terms.
Distribution to DSPs (YouTube Music, Spotify) through the label's pipeline. Every release gets a catalog ID and a status: in-studio, released, catalog.
Streaming and sync revenue lands against the release's catalog ID — one execution-level ledger entry per payout event, same auditability standard as the Portfolio division's systems.
The royalty engine applies the artist's split profile, recoups any outstanding advance from the artist's share first, then pays out the remainder — transparent and re-runnable.
The label's share funds the next signing, sync placement push, or production budget. Independent P&L, same holding-company discipline.

services.name: Label Services
services.detail: Distribution, release planning, and DSP delivery for signed artists — starting with Pat Dia's catalog.

services.name: Publishing & Sync
services.detail: Publishing administration and sync-licensing scouting for film, TV, and advertising placements.

services.name: Artist Development
services.detail: A&R, production support, and career planning — the same operator model Artispreneur brings to independent artists, applied to the label's own roster.

services.name: Royalty & Revenue Ops
services.detail: A transparent split engine — every payout traceable to a release, a split profile, and a recoupment ledger. No black-box accounting.

services.name: Catalog Intelligence
services.detail: The catalog-track-critic skill extracts structured metadata and a short critic-style description for every release, feeding one-sheets and sync-licensing pitches without a human drafting copy from scratch.
